title: MUIT Noida and Lucknow Campus Admissions Online Form 2026
short_information: Maharishi University MUIT Lucknow and Noida Campus has released the UG, PG and Diploma Courses Admissions 2026 online application for admission 2026 will start from March 2026 and the last date to apply will be 15 July 2026.candidates should read the information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Placement, information and other types of information and then apply. Maharishi University (MUIT) Noida & Lucknow MUIT Admissions Online Form 2026 Maharishi University (MUIT) Admissions 2026 | Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS: 500/- SC / ST : 500/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card / UPI, Credit Card / Net Banking Mode. Maharishi University (MUIT) Noida Campus: Admission Details 2026-27 Admissions are based on direct admission as per university seats and terms. Admissions follow a first-come, first-served basis and will close on 15th July. Course Name Maharishi University (MUIT) Noida Campus
